description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to build and test on multiple Linux distributions (alpine, archlinux, debian, fedora, opensuse, gentoo) with different C++ standards (c++17, c++20 for fedora). For each job, run on an ubuntu-latest environment with a container based on the current distribution, check out the code, configure the build with meson, build with ninja, and run tests with meson test.
